metadata.name: Find Images for a Blog Post

description: A content manager needs to find 2-3 licensed stock photos to include in a new blog post.

nodes.task_description: Identify the main theme and keywords of the blog post.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the visual style needed.

nodes.task_description: Search a stock photography website for relevant images using the identified keywords.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of potential images.

nodes.task_description: Select and download 2-3 high-quality, on-brand images.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acquires the necessary visual assets for the blog post.
